subject: fix: address bugs, security issues, and UX gaps from codebase review
body:
Fixes:
- HiddenField now calls onChange on mount so hidden values propagate to
  submission data (was silently dropping URL param pre-fills)
- PublicFormPage submission wrapped in try/catch so network errors show
  user-friendly messages instead of unhandled rejections
- postMessage in embedResize uses referrer origin instead of wildcard
  when available, reducing cross-origin message exposure
- Hidden field URL param matching now uses field.label (as documented
  in builder UI hint) instead of field.id
- Hidden field exclusion standardized across SubmissionDetail, csvExport,
  and SubmissionTable — all now filter both 'heading' and 'hidden'
- Theme color conflict resolved: buttons and progress bar use inline
  primaryColor only, removed conflicting bg-brand-600 hardcoded classes
- Scroll-to-first-error on validation failure so users see errors on
  long forms / mobile
- SortableFieldCard wrapped in React.memo to prevent all cards
  re-rendering during drag operations
- Replaced TODO comment in useAutoSave with descriptive comment
  referencing docs/TODO.md tracking item

Tags: bugfix, security, ux, performance, renderer, builder, dashboard
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch
